codeReview.summary: Clean, minimal fix that removes the unused `totalBeforeFilter` variable from internal/cli/cli.go:556. The change is a single-line deletion. The filtering logic (emptyFiltered and noaudioFiltered counters, the filtering conditionals, and the error message construction) remains fully intact. Build and all tests pass.

summary: The fix is a straightforward single-line removal of the unused `totalBeforeFilter` variable declaration in internal/cli/cli.go. The diff shows exactly one line deleted: `totalBeforeFilter := len(selected)`. The surrounding filtering logic — `emptyFiltered` and `noaudioFiltered` counter variables, the `filterEmptyLectures()` and `filterNoAudioLectures()` calls, and the error message construction when all lectures are filtered out — is completely untouched. Build (`go build ./...`) and all tests (`go test ./...`) pass. The worker followed the go-backend-worker skill procedure correctly: read the code, identified the issue, made a minimal fix, verified build and tests, and committed. No unrelated changes were introduced. This is a clean pass.
